scenarios.name: Claude Code — Summit Supply E-commerce Demo
scenarios.description: A small Next.js outdoor-gear storefront (Summit Supply) with a catalog, cart, and checkout. Supports two demo flows: fixing a bug and adding a feature. Great for showing Claude Code in Slack handling real-feeling customer-facing work.

bug_fix: @Claude Code we're getting reports that customers can't complete checkout on the Summit Supply site — they fill in the form, hit 'Place order', and get an error. Can you take a look and open a PR with a fix?
feature: @Claude Code can you add a wishlist feature to the Summit Supply site? Customers should be able to favorite products from the catalog with a heart icon, see a count in the header, and view their wishlist on a dedicated page.

runbook: Provision your demo repo: repomatic provision claude-code
Tag the demo repo (one-time): see repomatic README step 5
Install the Claude Code Slack app in your workspace (URL above) and connect it to your demo repo.
Run the storefront locally so your audience can see it: cd into the repo, npm install && npm run dev
Pick a scenario (bug fix or feature) and paste the relevant prompt from the list above into Slack.
Review the PR Claude Code opens. Merge it. Refresh the storefront to see the change live.
When you're ready to demo again: repomatic reset claude-code
